Approach: Excel to Clean in Excel to Power BI
Pros:
• No extra software needed
• Everything stays in one familiar tool
• Fastest for a single one off cleanup
Cons:
• Hard to repeat next month without redoing work by hand
• Difficult to audit what exactly changed vs original
• Easy to accidentally overwrite or lose raw data
• No real enforcement of data types
Best For: One time, small, non recurring cleanups

Approach: Excel to Clean in MySQL to Power BI
Pros:
• Raw data stays untouched in a staging table
• Cleaning logic lives in reusable SQL scripts
• Enforces real data types like DECIMAL and DATE
• Good for joins, dedup, and combining multiple sheets
• Scales well as data volume grows
Cons:
• Requires installing and managing MySQL Server
• More setup time and a learning curve for SQL
• Overkill for a small one time cleanup
Best For: Recurring imports, larger volume, multiple tools using same clean data
